description: A piece of mobile equipment (e.g., a crane) is being permanently transferred from one project site to another.

nodes.task_description: Find the asset in the maintenance system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the crane's asset record.

nodes.task_description: Update the asset's 'home location' from the old site to the new site in the asset master data.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the asset's location, which also transfers its maintenance and cost data to the new site.
